formulas.name: Introduction Formula
formulas.formula:
Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this letter finds you in good health and high spirits.
formulas.variables: Recipient's Name - the name of the person you are addressing
formulas.notes: Use this formula to begin a formal letter, addressing the recipient by their title and name.

formulas.name: Body Paragraph Formula
formulas.formula:
Although [situation/condition], I believe that [opinion/viewpoint].
This is because [reasons/evidence].
formulas.variables: situation/condition - the context of the letter, opinion/viewpoint - the writer's stance, reasons/evidence - supporting arguments
formulas.notes: Use this formula to structure body paragraphs in a formal letter, presenting a clear argument and supporting it with evidence.

formulas.name: Conclusion Formula
formulas.formula:
In conclusion, I would like to emphasize that [main point/key takeaway].
Thank you for your [time/attention].
formulas.variables: main point/key takeaway - the central idea of the letter, time/attention - the recipient's consideration
formulas.notes: Use this formula to conclude a formal letter, summarizing the main point and expressing gratitude.

formulas.name: Closing Formula
formulas.notes: Use this formula to end a formal letter, signing off with a polite closing and the writer's name.

formulas.name: Formal Letter Structure
formulas.notes: Use this formula to structure a formal letter, including an introduction, body paragraphs, a conclusion, and a closing.
